expect: GAP-5 identity differentiation: daughter swarm will lack identity-specification mechanism — CORE.md is copied verbatim, no epigenetic differentiation. Predict: 0 identity-modifying tools in daughter bundle
actual: CONFIRMED. 0/12 identity/self-assessment tools in daughter bundle. 17 operational tools (orient/dispatch/compress/reproduce), zero self-assessment (dogma_finder, knowledge_state, human_impact, science_quality, alignment_check, question_gen, fairness_audit, enforcement_router, bulletin, swarm_peer, swarm_combiner, steerer). Identity layer (CORE.md + PHILOSOPHY.md + SWARM.md = 69.7KB) copied verbatim with no mutation/adaptation mechanism. genesis_seeds.py selects by centrality, not variation. Protocol (CORE.md, SWARM.md) contains zero mentions of differentiation for daughters. cell_blueprint.py preserves state, doesn't differentiate.
diff: Prediction matched exactly: 0 identity tools. Additional finding: reproduction is clonal (binary fission), not recombinational. Three missing capabilities: (1) differentiation protocol — instructions for daughter to adapt identity to environment, (2) variation mechanism — controlled mutation in PHIL-N inheritance, (3) identity assessment tools — daughter cannot detect when inherited identity doesn't fit its context.
biological_parallel: Multicellular organisms share genome but differentiate via gene regulation (HOX genes, transcription factors). Swarm equivalent: 'identity adapter' that tags PHIL-N claims as INHERIT/SUSPEND/EXPLORE based on daughter environment.
minimum_fix: Add --differentiate flag to genesis_extract.py: (1) inject environment-sensing into daughter CORE.md, (2) tag PHILOSOPHY.md claims as INHERIT/SUSPEND/EXPLORE, (3) include dogma_finder.py + knowledge_state.py in daughter bundle
verdict: GAP-5 CONFIRMED OPEN — reproduction mechanism is clonal, no identity differentiation. Score: 8/10 → 8/10 (gap identified but not closed)
